title: Stuck in Traffic
description: Calling a coworker from the car to say you'll be late. Casual register, mild idioms — 'bumper-to-bumper', 'a nightmare'.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hey, where are you? The meeting's about to start.

templates.text: I'm so sorry, I'm stuck in traffic. It's bumper-to-bumper out here.
templates.hint_zh: 抱歉,我塞在車陣裡。整條都動不了。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh no. Any idea how long?

templates.text: Maybe twenty more minutes? My GPS keeps changing its mind.
templates.hint_zh: 再二十分鐘吧?導航一直在變。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: It's a nightmare every Monday. I'll let everyone know.

templates.text: Thanks. Can you cover the first part for me?
templates.hint_zh: 謝謝,前半段你可以先幫我頂嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yeah, no worries. Just get here when you can.

templates.text: You're a lifesaver. I owe you one.
templates.hint_zh: 你救了我。下次還你人情。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Coffee on you next time. Drive safe!
